name.en-US: Commentary on Matthew (Reportatio of Peter of Scala)

description.en-US: A *reportatio* of Aquinas's Matthew lectures by Peter of Scala — an alternate transmission of the Matthew commentary chapters that complements R. F. Larcher's text.
description.la: *Reportatio* Petri de Scala lectionum Thomae in Matthaeum — transmissio alternativa quae *reportationem* Legerii Bisuntini complet.

sources.description: English translation mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
